message:
feat(session): add pre-execution plan verification library

Read-only verification of action plans against current system state.
Detects PID reuse, UID change, process exit, and dead processes without
executing anything. Produces structured VerificationReport with
per-action verdicts and overall freshness score. 9 tests.

Closes: process_triage-ml1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
